title: Manager, Digital Commerce Engineering & AI
description:
About the Role
You will lead the engineering delivery, architecture, and AI innovation for regional Salesforce Commerce Cloud (SFCC) eCommerce platforms across SEAO, leveraging a shared global codebase to deliver high-performing online experiences.

Responsibilities

  • Own engineering strategy and solution architecture across SFCC, headless/PWA, Akamai, CMS/PIM, and key integrations.
  • Lead delivery of new features and enhancements with Product, OMS, and cross-functional stakeholders.
  • Manage external vendors and offshore teams to ensure quality, timelines, and scalable builds.
  • Drive DevOps maturity (CI/CD, Git workflows, automation), performance optimization, and code quality.
  • Oversee platform stability, incident management, and readiness for peak commercial events.
  • Deliver AI-powered commerce capabilities (personalization, smart search, automation, predictive insights) and run POCs for emerging technologies.


Requirements

  • 7+ years in eCommerce engineering, software development, or digital platforms.
  • Strong experience in SFCC B2C and modern web stack (React, JavaScript, Node.js, PWA).
  • Proven vendor/offshore team management experience.
  • Hands-on knowledge of API-driven architectures, DevOps, and CI/CD.
  • Exposure to CMS/PIM, payment gateway, MarTech integrations is a plus.
  • Experience in OMS/ERP/WMS is an advantage.
  • Experience delivering or implementing AI/ML solutions in digital commerce preferred

postedCompany.description:
Evolution Recruitment Solutions are an award winning, specialist IT and Digital recruitment consultancy with offices in Singapore, Sydney, UK, Germany and US. Formed in 2000 we have helped thousands of IT and Digital professionals secure their next Permanent, Contract or Interim position with companies ranging from SME to multinationals. Our professional and quality driven approach has led to Evolution being regularly recommended to others.  

Evolution have received a number of awards in recognition of the outstanding training, development and support we provide to our consultants which in turn results in a higher level of service for both applicants and clients:   


Investors In People - Gold  

2nd place The Sunday Times - 100 Best Small Companies to work for 

Best Companies - 3 Stars for Extraordinary Workforce Engagement  

Jobsite 'Best Industry Knowledge'​ Award  

Global Recruiter Asia Pacific Awards:  

- Best in-house training - Best Newcomer 

- APSCo Asia Member of the Year 

- Best Specialist Recruitment Business  

- Best Small Recruitment Business
